name: Life360AdsSDK
summary: Life360 Ads SDK is a lightweight framework that integrates directly with Nativo and Prebid Server.
description: Life360 Ads SDK is a lightweight framework that integrates directly with Prebid Server to increase yield for publishers by adding more mobile buyers."
